title: 6pcs 50ml Small Glass Bottles Vials Jars Glass with Cork Stopper Storage Bottle 50ml 37x70mm(1.45x2.75inch)
description:
About this item
Clear, favor jar with round, cork stopper

Size: 37x70mm(1.45x2.75inch), 50ml
Multifunctional Bottle. They are perfect gift for your friends.

› See more product details
reviews_5s: Quick shipping and we'll packaged.Used them with Harry Potter labels for our party and they were a huge hit. I poured nail polish in and swirled it around to make it look like it was filled with potion.They're light weight. Opening is large enough to put things into & get out. You can pick it up by the cork & it stays together.I really love these "little" vials! They were bubbled-wrapped within an inch of their lives, which took FOREVER to unwrap, but I have no complaints as they all arrived unbroken and are sturdier than I was expecting. I really appreciate the vendor taking time to wrap them so meticulously.These are great little jars. I use them for storing snake sheds and my bird's feathersI like using these for making little scenes inside them. I've ordered a couple of times and they've arrived both times in good shape, no breaks!Worked beautifully for a mini urn to hand out for an ashes scattering ceremony.I use this pack of six glass bottles to replace my pill bottles. Looks much nicer than anything else I could find. The cork stoppers fit very snugly.These were what I looking for, Just the right size and amount that I needed.These were the perfect size for the shells my grandson brought back from the beaches in Hawaii!
reviews_1s: The glass is incredibly thin, poor quality and overpriced. You can buy much better jars of similar size with other brands.Does not closeThe bottle on the left is the size I received. The bottle on the right looks more like the size advertised. These are SO small. They are cute and all but not large enough for what I needed.What tiny hands this hand model has. I imagine purposely deceptive. Returning this, since the option to reduce the size of my hands is not covered by my insurance.Very disappointed that this item arrived broken.
